Good morning, everyone. Today I will give a short overview of how our firm helps clients value their assets. There are three points on my agenda. First, let me walk you through our process. We inspect, we compare, and we report. Next, let us move on to our results. I want to highlight one number: our valuations are accurate within five percent. That is what sets us apart. So, what is the key takeaway? It is simple: accuracy builds trust. To sum up, we deliver clear, reliable reports that our clients can depend on. Let me wrap up here. Thank you very much for your time, and I am happy to take any questions.
